item.title: 7499 元起，OPPO Find X9 Ultra 正式发布、Pro 系列涨价 300 元
item.guid: 7499-元起，OPPO-Find-X9-Ultra-正式发布、Pro-系列涨价-300-元
item.description:
OPPO held a new product launch event last night, officially introducing the Find X9 Ultra, X9s Pro series, and several new tablets and wearables. The Find X9 Ultra starts at 7499 yuan, with the top-tier satellite communication version priced at 9499 yuan, and the Hasselblad Master Kit version reaching 11999 yuan. It features the fifth-generation Snapdragon 8 Extreme Edition processor, focusing on flagship imaging: OPPO 于昨晚举行新品发布会，正式推出 Find X9 Ultra、X9s Pro 系列及多款平板、可穿戴新品。Find X9 Ultra 起售价 7499 元，顶配卫星通信版售价 9499 元，哈苏大师套装版则达 11999 元。搭载第五代骁龙 8 至尊版处理器，主打旗舰影像：

    200MP LYT-901 main camera (OIS, 23mm, F1.5) + 50MP LYT-600 ultra-wide angle (14mm, F2.0) + 200MP OV52A periscope telephoto (OIS, 70mm, F2.2) + 50MP JNL super telephoto (OIS, 230mm, F3.5), second-generation Danxia color reproduction lens, and 32MP front camera (supports AF);

    For video, it supports 4K/120fps and 8K/30fps 10-bit Log recording, with Hasselblad Master Mode offering native film, 6-focal length Hasselblad 8K ultra-clear photos, and O-Log2 video tones;

    6.82-inch centered punch-hole flat screen, 3168×1440, 120Hz 8T LTPO, 510ppi, Jingdun glass, 2160Hz PWM dimming;

    Built-in 7050mAh battery, supports 100W wired + 50W wireless charging;

    IP66 & 68 & 69 triple protection rating, body dimensions 163.04*76.91*8.65mm, weight 235g.

The Find X9s Pro starts at 5299 yuan, consistent with the previous generation, featuring the MediaTek Dimensity 9500 platform, a 6.32-inch flat screen, a 200MP main camera, a 7025mAh battery, a body thickness of 8.4mm, and a weight of 198g. Find X9s Pro 起售价 5299 元，与上代持平，采用联发科天玑 9500 平台，搭载 6.32 英寸直屏，主摄同为 200MP，电池容量 7025mAh，机身厚度 8.4mm、重 198g。

OPPO Chief Product Officer Liu Zuohu frankly stated at the press conference that new phones in the industry have generally seen significant price increases this year, and OPPO is facing considerable cost pressure. This pricing is a huge challenge for the industry. He further emphasized that they cannot promise no price increases throughout the year, making now the best time to buy. OPPO 首席产品官刘作虎在发布会上坦言，今年行业新机普遍大幅涨价，OPPO 面临不小成本压力，该定价对行业是巨大挑战。他进一步强调，无法承诺全年不涨价，当下是入手的最佳时机。

It is worth noting that the previously released Find X9 Pro underwent a price increase just before this launch event, with prices for various versions rising by up to 300 yuan. The 12GB + 256GB version increased from 5299 yuan to 5599 yuan, and the 16GB + 1TB version from 6699 yuan to 6999 yuan. 值得关注的是，此前发布的 Find X9 Pro 在本次发布会前夕完成了一轮涨价，各版本售价最高上调 300 元，12G + 256GB 版本由 5299 元涨至 5599 元，16G + 1TB 版本由 6699 元涨至 6999 元。

Wearables and new tablets: 可穿戴、平板新品：

    Enco Clip2 open-back headphones debut at 849 yuan, featuring 9+11mm dual dynamic drivers, co-tuned by Dynaudio, the industry's first 6nm chip, 9.5 hours of single charge battery life, and a total weight of 46.3g;

    Watch X3 Mini smartwatch starts at 1799 yuan, with a 1.32-inch AMOLED screen, supports eSIM independent calling, and offers 2.5 days of battery life in full smart mode;

    OPPO Pad 5 Pro starts at 4299 yuan, featuring the fifth-generation Snapdragon 8 Extreme Edition, a 13.2-inch LCD screen, a large 13380mAh battery, and a body thickness of only 5.94mm;

    OPPO Pad mini starts at 3699 yuan, with an 8.8-inch AMOLED, Snapdragon 8 Gen5 platform, weighing 279g, focusing on portability.

🔗 Related reading: OPPO Releases Find X9 Ultra: The Optimal Solution for Concert Phones 🔗 相关阅读： OPPO 发布 Find X9 Ultra：演唱会手机的最优解

item.title: GPT Image 2 全量上线，中文渲染能力大升级
item.guid: GPT-Image-2-全量上线，中文渲染能力大升级
item.description:
OpenAI's image generation model, GPT Image 2, was officially rolled out yesterday to all ChatGPT users, including free accounts. OpenAI 旗下图像生成模型 GPT Image 2 昨日正式全量推送，面向所有 ChatGPT 用户开放，包括免费账号。

GPT Image 2 has made significant breakthroughs in Chinese text rendering capabilities. According to APPSO's testing of the model , GPT Image 2 can accurately reproduce the Song/Kai font typesetting style of elementary school math test papers, including details like fill-in-the-blank underlines and geometric annotations; GPT Image 2 中文文字渲染能力有了极大突破。据 APPSO 对该模型的测试 ，GPT Image 2 已能精准还原小学数学试卷的宋体/楷体排版风格，包括填空题下划线、几何图形标注等细节；

Furthermore, Image 2 can fully replicate the Douyin live streaming interface, including the hierarchical logic of interactive elements such as the comment section, like and share buttons, viewer count, and scrolling marquee; the reproduction of League of Legends team fight scenes also includes details like health bars, skill effects, and mini-map UI frames. 此外，Image 2 能够完整复刻抖音直播界面，包括评论区、点赞与分享按钮、观众人数及跑马灯等交互元素的层级逻辑；对英雄联盟团战画面的还原同样包含血条、技能特效及小地图 UI 框等细节。

At the commercial application level, GPT Image 2 can directly generate finished images for business proposals and e-commerce placements, covering scenarios such as product exploded views, high-end commercial advertisements, movie posters, and comic book panels. Work that previously took 3D modelers or professional designers several days to complete can now generate high-quality prototype references in seconds. 商业应用层面，GPT Image 2 已能直接生成可用于商业提案和电商投放的成品图，涵盖产品分解图、高端商业广告、电影海报及漫画分镜等场景，过去需要 3D 建模师或专业设计师数天完成的工作，现在可在数秒内生成高品质原型参考。

🔗 Related Reading: Just now, after testing GPT-Image-2: Designers are not doomed, but I was fooled by AI 🔗 相关阅读： 刚刚，实测完 GPT-Image-2：设计师没完蛋，但我被 AI 骗麻了

item.title: 分析师：苹果评估 CEO 更看重多元化
item.guid: 分析师：苹果评估-CEO-更看重多元化
item.description:
Yesterday, Apple officially announced that Tim Cook will step down as CEO on September 1st, transitioning to Executive Chairman; John Ternus, current Senior Vice President of Hardware Engineering, will officially take over. In response, Tianfeng International Securities analyst Ming-Chi Kuo published an article analyzing this leadership change. 昨天，苹果官宣 Tim Cook 将于 9 月 1 日卸任 CEO，转任执行董事长；现任硬件工程高级副总裁 John Ternus 正式接棒。对此，天风国际证券分析师郭明錤发文，就这一换帅决定进行了分析。

Kuo believes that Ternus's most representative achievement was leading the smooth migration of Mac from x86 to ARM (Apple Silicon). This system-level platform transition encompassed software and hardware integration and the reconstruction of the developer ecosystem. It is precisely this "brain transplant" experience that makes him the right person to lead Apple into the era of on-device AI. 郭明錤认为，Ternus 最具代表性的成就是主导 Mac 从 x86 平稳迁移至 ARM（Apple Silicon）。这场系统级平台转换涵盖软硬件整合与开发者生态重建，正是这段「换脑手术」经验，使他成为带领苹果迈向设备端 AI 时代的合适人选。

Regarding the selection logic, Kuo pointed out that Ternus did not come from the iPhone system, reflecting that the board's evaluation criteria for CEO have become more diverse. He also mentioned that the Asian supply chain circle had previously widely bet on Jeff Williams taking over, and this judgment only changed after his retirement news was announced. 在人选逻辑上，郭明錤指出，Ternus 并非出身 iPhone 体系，反映出董事会对 CEO 的评估标准已趋向多元。他还提到，此前亚洲供应链圈普遍押注 Jeff Williams 接任，直至其退休消息公布后判断才随之改变。

Kuo expects Ternus to continue the supply chain management mechanism established by Tim Cook and deepen technical cooperation with suppliers. 郭明錤预计，Ternus 将延续 Tim Cook 建立的供应链管理机制，并加深与供应商的技术合作。

According to Bloomberg, Ternus is believed to be able to recreate the decisive and tough decision-making style of the Jobs era. As the core head of Apple's hardware business, Ternus has long been deeply involved in the R&D and decision-making of core product lines such as iPhone and Mac, and holds high prestige within Apple. 另据彭博社报道，Ternus 被认为能够重现乔布斯时代那种果断、强硬的决策风格。作为苹果硬件业务的核心负责人，Ternus 长期深度参与 iPhone、Mac 等核心产品线的研发与决策，在苹果内部具有较高威望。

item.title: QuestMobile：今年一季度 AI 原生 App 月活破 4.4 亿、腾讯 WorkBuddy 周活大增 72.2%
item.guid: QuestMobile：今年一季度-AI-原生-App-月活破-4.4-亿、腾讯-WorkBuddy-周活大增-72.2%
item.description:
Yesterday, market research firm QuestMobile released its Q1 2026 AI Application Insights, showing that the overall user scale and stickiness of the domestic AI-native App industry achieved dual-driven growth, with industry competition officially entering the "second half". 昨天，市场调研机构 QuestMobile 发布 2026 年一季度 AI 应用洞察，国内 AI 原生 App 行业整体用户规模与粘性实现双轮驱动增长，行业竞争正式进入「下半场」。

The research report shows that as of March this year, the monthly active user (MAU) scale of AI-native Apps reached 446 million, with Doubao, Qianwen, and DeepSeek ranking in the top three, with MAUs of 345 million, 166 million, and 127 million respectively. 研报显示，截至今年 3 月，AI 原生 App 月活用户规模达 4.46 亿，豆包、千问、DeepSeek 位居前三，月活分别为 3.45 亿、1.66 亿和 1.27 亿。

In the first quarter, the industry's average monthly usage frequency reached 87.1 times, and the average monthly usage duration reached 173.3 minutes, representing year-on-year increases of 55.3% and 41.4% respectively. The industry is shifting from last year's "surging user numbers" to this year's "simultaneous growth in user numbers and user stickiness". 一季度行业月人均使用次数达 87.1 次、月人均使用时长达 173.3 分钟，同比分别提升 55.3% 和 41.4%，行业正从去年的「用户量飙涨」转向今年的「用户量与用户粘性齐涨」。

The report points out that this year's Spring Festival "red packet war" was the main reason for the growth. After the holiday, Doubao's DAU remained at approximately 140 million, while Qianwen and Yuanbao stabilized at approximately 30 million and 9 million respectively. 研报指出，今年春节「红包大战」是增长的主因。节后豆包 DAU 维持在约 1.4 亿，千问和元宝则分别稳定在约 3000 万和 900 万。

At the "Claw" platform ecosystem level, Tencent's WorkBuddy saw its weekly active users increase by 72.2%, surpassing 200,000, leading the market; Alibaba's QoderWork and QwenPaw grew slightly by 10.1% and 8.4% respectively, with both scales remaining below 100,000; 在「龙虾」Claw 平台生态层面，腾讯旗下 WorkBuddy 周活跃用户增幅达 72.2%，规模突破 20 万，领跑市场；阿里旗下 QoderWork 和 QwenPaw 分别小幅增长 10.1% 和 8.4%，规模均不足 10 万；

Zhipu's AutoClaw declined by 14.1%; Alibaba's JVSClaw saw the largest drop, reaching 57.5%, with its scale falling below 20,000. QuestMobile points out that the Claw ecosystem is currently still in the scale expansion phase, network effects are accumulating, and there is still a long exploration period before true value realization. 智谱旗下 AutoClaw 下滑 14.1%；阿里旗下 JVSClaw 降幅最大，达 57.5%，规模跌至不足 2 万。QuestMobile 指出，Claw 生态目前仍处于规模扩张阶段，网络效应正在积累，距离真正的价值兑现仍有较长探索周期。

item.title: 爱奇艺推 AI 艺人库遭演员集体辟谣，CEO 连发三文：科技永远不是为了取代人
item.guid: 爱奇艺推-AI-艺人库遭演员集体辟谣，CEO-连发三文：科技永远不是为了取代人
item.description:
Yesterday, iQiyi CEO Gong Yu posted three consecutive messages on Weibo, publicly clarifying the controversy surrounding its AI artist library: 昨天，爱奇艺 CEO 龚宇在微博连发三条帖文，就旗下 AI 艺人库引发的争议公开澄清：

Artists entering the library only represents an intention to engage, and specific projects and roles still require separate authorization, "which makes no change to the current business model"; the previous mention of "intangible cultural heritage" was also not a final conclusion, but an open discussion about future forms of film and television. 艺人入库仅代表接洽意愿，具体项目与角色仍需单独授权，「跟现在的商业模式没有任何变化」；此前「非遗」一说也并非定论，而是对未来影视形态的开放性探讨。

He also emphasized: "Technology is people-oriented, technology always serves people, and technology is never meant to replace people." 他同时强调：「科技以人为本，科技永远是为人服务的，科技永远不是为了取代人。」

Previously, iQiyi announced that its AI creation platform "NaDou Pro" officially launched an AI artist library, with over 100 performing artists already registered. 此前，爱奇艺宣布旗下 AI 创作平台「纳逗 Pro」正式上线 AI 艺人库，已有超过 100 位演艺人士入驻。

Subsequently, several artists, including Zhang Ruoyun and Yu Hewei, successively posted to refute rumors, denying that they had signed AI-related authorizations. Zhang Ruoyun's studio even stated that "legal affairs are being urgently processed," causing widespread controversy. 随后，张若昀、于和伟等多位艺人相继发文辟谣，否认已签署 AI 相关授权，张若昀工作室更表示「法务正在紧急处理」，引起广泛争议。

iQiyi CEO Gong Yu also proposed at the press conference that in the future, live-action film and television works created entirely by humans might be named "intangible cultural heritage"; he also stated that after actors authorize AI, they can increase the number of projects taken annually from 2 to 4, while reducing work intensity. 爱奇艺 CEO 龚宇还在发布会现场提出，未来完全由人类创作的真人实拍影视作品，可能会被命名为「非物质文化遗产」；并表示，演员授权 AI 后可将年接项目数从 2 部提升至 4 部，同时降低工作强度。

This statement was widely interpreted as the platform's intention to replace real actors with AI, triggering a collective backlash from industry professionals and audiences. 这一表述被广泛解读为平台有意以 AI 取代真人演员，引发从业人员和观众集体反弹。

item.title: 小米罗福莉获青年五四奖章提名
item.guid: 小米罗福莉获青年五四奖章提名
item.description:
Yesterday, the Xiaomi Group Youth League Committee's official WeChat account published the "Public Notice of Nomination List for the Youth May Fourth Medal by Xiaomi Youth League Committee," announcing the nomination list for the 8th "Xiaomi Group Youth May Fourth Medal" selection. A total of 5 people were selected, including Luo Fuli, head of the MiMo large model at the Group Technology Committee. 昨天，小米集团团委微信公众号发布《小米团委关于青年五四奖章提名名单的公示》，公布第八届「小米集团青年五四奖章」评选提名名单，共 5 人入选，集团技术委员会 MiMo 大模型负责人罗福莉在列。

The complete list of nominees, sorted by the number of strokes in their surnames, includes Wang Dong from the Automotive Department, Li Gangjian from the International Business Department, Chen Kai from China Region, Luo Fuli from the Group Technology Committee, and Liang Ying from the Mobile Phone Department. The public notification period is from April 20 to April 24 this year, and after the notification period ends, commendation and publicity work is planned for May.

Luo Fuli has successively worked at Alibaba DAMO Academy, Huanfang Quant, and DeepSeek, leading the development of the multilingual pre-trained model VECO, and deeply participating in the R&D of DeepSeek-V2. On November 12 last year, Luo Fuli officially announced joining Xiaomi, serving as the head of the MiMo large model. 罗福莉先后供职于阿里达摩院、幻方量化及 DeepSeek，主导开发了多语言预训练模型 VECO，并深度参与了 DeepSeek-V2 的研发。去年 11 月 12 日，罗福莉正式官宣加入小米，出任 MiMo 大模型负责人。

item.title: SpaceX 或以 600 亿美元收购 Cursor
item.guid: SpaceX-或以-600-亿美元收购-Cursor
item.description:
Today, SpaceX announced that it has reached a cooperation agreement with AI programming tool Cursor, and the two parties will jointly develop the next generation of "programming and knowledge work AI". 今天，SpaceX 宣布已与 AI 编程工具 Cursor 达成合作协议，双方将共同开发下一代「编程与知识工作 AI」。

According to SpaceX's official statement, this cooperation will combine Cursor's leading products and distribution capabilities among professional software engineers with the computing power resources of SpaceX's Colossus supercomputer, whose computing power is equivalent to 1 million Nvidia H100 graphics cards. 根据 SpaceX 的官方声明，此次合作将结合 Cursor 在专业软件工程师群体中的领先产品与分发能力，以及 SpaceX 旗下 Colossus 超级计算机的算力资源，其算力相当于 100 万块英伟达 H100 显卡。

SpaceX also stated that at some point this year, it will choose to pay Cursor a cooperation fee of 10 billion US dollars, or complete a full acquisition of it for 60 billion US dollars . SpaceX 同时表示，将在今年某个时间节点，选择向 Cursor 支付 100 亿美元的合作费用，或 以 600 亿美元完成对其的全面收购 。

Just last week, reports indicated that xAI has begun leasing its data center's computing power to Cursor, which is using tens of thousands of xAI chips to train its latest AI models. 就在上周，有报道指出 xAI 已开始向 Cursor 出租其数据中心的算力，后者正借助数以万计的 xAI 芯片训练其最新 AI 模型。

Meanwhile, Cursor's two senior engineering leaders, Andrew Milich and Jason Ginsberg, have successively resigned to join xAI and report directly to Musk. In addition, TechCrunch also reported last week that Cursor is seeking to complete a new round of private financing at a valuation of 50 billion US dollars. 与此同时，Cursor 两位资深工程负责人 Andrew Milich 与 Jason Ginsberg 也相继离职，加入 xAI 并直接向马斯克汇报。此外，TechCrunch 上周还曾报道，Cursor 正寻求以 500 亿美元估值完成新一轮私募融资。

item.title: 员工故意删除 AI 训练数据被起诉，北京市检察机关深化知识产权保护
item.guid: 员工故意删除-AI-训练数据被起诉，北京市检察机关深化知识产权保护
item.description:
According to 21st Century Business Herald, the Beijing Municipal People's Procuratorate yesterday released the "Beijing Procuratorial Organs Intellectual Property Procuratorial White Paper (2025)". 据 21 世纪经济报道，北京市人民检察院昨日发布《北京市检察机关知识产权检察白皮书（2025 年）》。

Last year, Beijing's procuratorial organs handled a total of 1,195 intellectual property cases, a year-on-year increase of 10.34%. Among these, there were 744 criminal procuratorial cases, with 234 cases involving 420 people reviewed for prosecution. Civil procuratorial cases increased by 2.15 times year-on-year, and public interest litigation procuratorial cases increased by 5.5 times year-on-year.

In terms of AI industry protection, Beijing's procuratorial organs handled a total of 113 intellectual property cases involving the artificial intelligence industry and data element industry last year, covering cutting-edge legal issues such as AI technology infringement determination, legal attributes of model training data, and data intellectual property ownership definition. 在 AI 产业保护方面，北京市检察机关去年共办理涉人工智能产业、数据要素产业知识产权案件 113 件，涵盖 AI 技术侵权认定、模型训练数据法律属性、数据知识产权权属界定等前沿法律议题。

Among them, the first case in the city handled by the Dongcheng District Procuratorate involving the illegal deletion of AI model training data is particularly typical. The employee involved deliberately deleted a large amount of data used by the company to train AI models, leading to structural damage to the model training system and causing significant economic losses . 其中，东城区检察院办理的全市首例非法删除 AI 模型训练数据案尤为典型。 涉案员工故意删除公司用于训练 AI 模型的大量数据，导致模型训练系统结构性破坏，造成重大经济损失 。

The procuratorial organs ultimately prosecuted the case under the charge of "crime of sabotaging computer information systems," promoting the inclusion of AI model training systems into the scope of criminal law protection. The Tongzhou District Procuratorate, on the other hand, handled the city's first case of copyright infringement using AI-generated models, with all four defendants being sentenced for the crime of copyright infringement. 检察机关最终以「破坏计算机信息系统罪」提起公诉，推动将 AI 模型训练系统纳入刑法保护范畴。通州区检察院则办理了全市首例利用 AI 生成模型侵犯著作权案，四名被告人均因犯侵犯著作权罪被判处刑罚。

item.title: 长安汽车宣布整合阿维塔与深蓝
item.guid: 长安汽车宣布整合阿维塔与深蓝
item.description:
According to Yicai Global, yesterday, Zhu Huarong, Chairman of Changan Automobile, announced at a communication meeting after the group's global strategy press conference that the Avatr and Deepal brands under its umbrella will undergo strategic integration, aiming to form a mid-to-high-end brand matrix with a scale of 1.5 million units by 2030. 据第一财经报道，昨日，长安汽车董事长朱华荣在集团全球战略发布会后沟通会上宣布，将对旗下阿维塔和深蓝两个品牌进行战略性整合，目标到 2030 年形成 150 万辆级的中高端品牌矩阵。

Among them, Avatr aims for annual sales of 500,000 units, and Deepal Auto aims for annual sales of 1 million units. Zhu Huarong stated that efficiency will be further improved after the integration is completed, which is expected to be finalized by the end of this year. 其中，阿维塔目标年销 50 万辆，深蓝汽车目标年销 100 万辆。朱华荣表示，整合完成后效率将进一步提升，预计今年年底完成整合。

At the press conference, Zhu Huarong also disclosed Changan Automobile's overall strategic plan: 在发布会上，朱华荣同时披露了长安汽车的整体战略规划：

    In the next five years, the company will further focus on a large single-product strategy, compressing its product portfolio from 63 models to 36 models, a reduction of 43%, and plans to create one global blockbuster product with annual sales of 500,000 units and five global blockbuster products with annual sales of 300,000 units;

    By 2030, Changan Automobile's overall annual production and sales target is 4 million units, with an ambitious goal of 5 million units. Among these, the Changan brand will contribute 2.6 million units, new energy vehicles will account for over 60%, and overseas sales will reach 35%~40%.

item.title: 大众 CEO：全球产能将再砍 100 万辆，2028 年前降至 900 万辆
item.guid: 大众-CEO：全球产能将再砍-100-万辆，2028-年前降至-900-万辆
item.description:
According to Reuters, Volkswagen CEO Oliver Blume said yesterday in an interview with "Manager Magazin" that Volkswagen is planning to further cut production capacity by about 1 million units. 据路透社报道，大众汽车 CEO 奥利弗·布鲁姆（Oliver Blume）昨日在接受《经理人杂志》采访时表示，大众正计划进一步削减产能，规模约为 100 万辆。

Blume stated, "We are currently studying plans to cut up to another 1 million units of production capacity to reflect the actual conditions of the global market." He also pointed out that past production planning is no longer realistic in the current market and competitive environment. 布鲁姆称，「我们目前正在研究最多再削减 100 万辆产能的方案，以反映全球市场的实际状况。」他同时指出，过去的产量规划在当前的市场与竞争环境下已不切实际。

Volkswagen had previously cut its annual production capacity in China by 1 million units. Blume further revealed yesterday that Europe also plans to reduce capacity by 1 million units by 2028, mainly focusing on the Volkswagen and Audi brands. 大众此前已在中国将年产能削减了 100 万辆。布鲁姆昨日进一步透露，欧洲方面同样计划在 2028 年前将产能降低 100 万辆，主要集中在大众品牌与奥迪。

At that time, we will reduce the total input capacity from over 12 million vehicles to a sustainable 9 million vehicles per year.

item.title: 理想 × 高德官宣合作，座舱 AI Agent 落地车端
item.guid: 理想-×-高德官宣合作，座舱-AI-Agent-落地车端
item.description:
Yesterday, Li Auto announced that Amap's automotive travel AI intelligent agent will be first launched in Li Auto vehicles, making it the first car manufacturer to implement this solution. Amap officially confirmed the partnership shortly after. 昨天，理想汽车宣布，高德汽车出行 AI 智能体将首发搭载于理想汽车，成为首家落地该解决方案的车企。高德地图官方随即确认，双方合作正式公开。

Amap's newly launched automotive travel AI intelligent agent focuses on natural language interaction in complex travel scenarios, covering fuzzy destination search, multi-destination sequential planning, temporary route changes during travel, and coordinated arrangements for road conditions and energy replenishment during long-distance holiday trips. The goal is to enable drivers to complete complex commands with 'one sentence'. 高德此次推出的汽车出行 AI 智能体，主打复杂出行场景下的自然语言交互，覆盖目的地模糊搜索、多目的地串联规划、途中临时改线，以及节假日长途出行中路况与补能的协同安排，目标是让驾驶者「一句话」完成复杂指令的下达。

According to Sina Tech, in addition to its self-developed cockpit AI intelligent agent (Li Auto VLA), Li Auto is actively seeking external collaborations. This partnership with Amap is the implementation of a parallel strategy of 'self-development + external cooperation'. 另据新浪科技报道，理想汽车在自研座舱 AI 智能体（理想 VLA）之外，正积极寻求外部合作，此次与高德的合作即为「自研 + 外部合作」并行策略的落地。

item.title: 💡 周鸿祎：未来企业是碳基与硅基员工的混合体
item.guid: 💡-周鸿祎：未来企业是碳基与硅基员工的混合体
item.description:
According to The Paper, yesterday, Zhou Hongyi, founder of 360 Group, stated at the 2026 China Internet Development Symposium that artificial intelligence is moving from the 'large model stage' to the 'intelligent agent stage', and the industry's focus is undergoing a fundamental shift: 据澎湃新闻报道，昨日，360 集团创始人周鸿祎在 2026 中国互联网发展座谈会上表示，人工智能正从「大模型阶段」迈入「智能体阶段」，行业重心正在发生根本性转移：

Intelligent agents are no longer just tools, but 'digital experts' capable of undertaking professional work, which will reshape human-computer collaboration.

AI intelligent agents represented by 'Lobster' have acquired the ability to call tools and autonomously complete tasks, beginning to enter actual production processes. At the enterprise level, Zhou Hongyi predicts that the popularization of AI intelligent agents will profoundly change organizational structures: 以「龙虾」为代表的 AI 智能体已具备调用工具、自主完成任务的能力，开始进入实际生产环节。在企业形态层面，周鸿祎预判，AI 智能体的普及将深刻改变组织结构：

With the popularization of intelligent agents, enterprises will gradually form hybrid teams of carbon-based employees + silicon-based employees.

He also pointed out that employees need to possess the ability to manage and collaborate with AI intelligent agents, and AI intelligent agents will also significantly lower the threshold for entrepreneurship, promoting the development of new business models such as 'one-person companies'. 他同时指出，员工需要具备管理和协同 AI 智能体的能力，而 AI 智能体也将显著降低创业门槛，推动「一人公司」等新型商业模式的发展。

At the industrial impact level, Zhou Hongyi expects that in the next three to five years, China is likely to form a hundred-billion-scale AI intelligent agent ecosystem, becoming the main force of the internet and fostering a brand new intelligent economic ecosystem. 在产业影响层面，周鸿祎预计未来三到五年，中国有望形成百亿规模的 AI 智能体，成为互联网的主力军，催生全新的智能经济生态。

Regarding computing power, he pointed out that the computing demand brought by AI intelligent agent applications will be far higher than traditional AI, with Token consumption potentially increasing tens or even hundreds of times, thereby driving the coordinated development of industries such as computing power, chips, and electricity. China's advantages in energy infrastructure will become an important support in this era. 算力层面，他指出 AI 智能体应用带来的计算需求将远高于传统 AI，Token 消耗可能提升数十倍甚至百倍，从而带动算力、芯片及电力等产业协同发展，中国在能源基础设施方面的优势将成为这一时代的重要支撑。

item.title: 首销 2999 元起，REDMI K90 Max 正式发布
item.guid: 首销-2999-元起，REDMI-K90-Max-正式发布
item.description:
Last night, REDMI officially released its first fan-cooled smartphone, the K90 Max, featuring a built-in fan and designed for ultimate gaming experience. First, let's look at the prices: 昨晚，REDMI 正式发布旗下首款内置风扇的风冷散热手机 K90 Max，主打极致游戏体验。先看价格：

First sale prices: 12GB+256GB for 2999 yuan; 16GB+256GB for 3499 yuan; 12GB+512GB for 3499 yuan; 16GB+512GB for 3999 yuan; 16GB+1TB for 4699 yuan. The starting price after national subsidy for the first sale is 2549 yuan.

A netizen commented under the Weibo post of Lu Weibing, President of Xiaomi Group, asking: 'Mr. Lu, 2999 is too good, are you still making money?' Lu Weibing replied: 'Losses.' 有网友在小米集团总裁卢伟兵的微博下评论，询问道：「卢总，2999 太香了还赚钱吗？」，卢伟冰回应：「亏损。」

The K90 Max body features a built-in 18.1mm fan and adopts an upright air intake structure. Official test data shows that the device can achieve a maximum body surface temperature drop of 10℃ within 100 seconds, cooling from 48℃ to 38℃ in just 100 seconds. K90 Max 机身内置 18.1mm 风扇，采用直立式进风结构。官方实测数据显示，该机可在 100 秒内实现最高 10℃ 的机身表面降温，从 48℃ 降至 38℃ 仅需 100 秒。

It is worth noting that the suspended independent sealed air duct design allows the K90 Max to still pass IP66/IP68/IP69 dust and water resistance certifications, and the fan unit itself also supports IPX8/IPX9 level protection. 值得注意的是，悬浮式独立密闭风道设计使 K90 Max 整机依然通过了 IP66/IP68/IP69 防尘防水认证，风扇单体亦支持 IPX8/IPX9 级别防护。

In terms of performance, the K90 Max is equipped with a MediaTek Dimensity 9500 processor and an AI discrete graphics chip D2, coupled with LPDDR5X Ultra memory and UFS 4.1 flash storage, a built-in 8550mAh battery, and supports 100W wired fast charging. 性能方面，K90 Max 搭载联发科天玑 9500 处理器与 AI 独显芯片 D2，配合 LPDDR5X Ultra 内存与 UFS 4.1 闪存，内置 8550mAh 电池，支持 100W 有线快充。

item.title: 套装 329 元起，大疆发布 DJI Mic Mini 2
item.guid: 套装-329-元起，大疆发布-DJI-Mic-Mini-2
item.description:
Yesterday, DJI officially released the new mini wireless microphone DJI Mic Mini 2, continuing its ultra-lightweight design while introducing a colorful appearance system for the first time: 昨天，大疆正式发布全新迷你无线麦克风 DJI Mic Mini 2，延续极致轻量化设计的同时，首次引入多彩外观系统：

It comes standard with 2 magnetic front covers in Obsidian Black and Cloud White, and additionally offers a total of 8 multi-color magnetic front covers for users to switch freely, along with 5 colored windproof fur covers for selection.

The transmitter weighs only 11 grams and supports both magnetic and clip-on wearing methods; it supports 48kHz 24-bit high-quality audio recording, with three built-in timbre presets (default, full, bright), and offers two levels of active noise reduction; it supports mixed connection transmission technology, allowing the receiver to pair with two transmitters simultaneously, with a maximum reception range of 400 meters. 发射器仅重 11 克，支持磁吸与夹持两种佩戴方式；支持 48kHz 24-bit 高品质音频录制，机身内置默认、饱满、明亮三种音色预设，并提供两级主动降噪；支持混连传输技术，接收器可同时配对两个发射器，最远收音距离可达 400 米。

In terms of battery life, a single transmitter lasts 11.5 hours, and the receiver lasts 10.5 hours. With the charging case, the total battery life can reach 48 hours. 续航方面，单个发射器续航达 11.5 小时，接收器为 10.5 小时，配合充电盒总续航可达 48 小时。

Regarding pricing, four different kits are launched this time: a two-transmitter, one-receiver kit with charging case: 599 yuan (additionally includes 1 set of multi-color magnetic front covers); a one-transmitter, one-receiver kit: 329 yuan; a mobile version two-transmitter, one-receiver kit with charging case: 429 yuan; a mobile version one-transmitter, one-receiver kit with charging case: 329 yuan. 售价方面，本次共推出 4 种套装：两发一收含充电盒套装：599 元（额外内含 1 套多色磁吸前盖）；一发一收套装：329 元；手机版两发一收含充电盒套装：429 元；手机版一发一收含充电盒套装：329 元。

Additionally, DJI also teased an advanced version, the DJI Mic Mini 2S, which will upgrade existing features with independent internal recording and a four-transmitter, one-receiver function. The specific release date has not yet been disclosed. 此外，大疆同步预告进阶版 DJI Mic Mini 2S，将在现有基础上升级搭载独立内录与四发一收功能，具体发布时间尚未披露。

item.title: 299 元，Beats 推出 3 米超长充电线，支持 240W 快充
item.guid: 299-元，Beats-推出-3-米超长充电线，支持-240W-快充
item.description:
Beats announced yesterday the launch of a 3-meter USB-C to USB-C cable, priced at 299 yuan. Beats 昨日宣布推出一款 3 米 USB-C 转 USB-C 连接线，售价 299 元。

The new cable is available in four colors: Lightning Black, Surge Grey, Velocity Blue, and Power Red. It supports up to 240W fast charging, is compatible with all Apple and Android devices equipped with a USB-C port, and supports various usage scenarios such as charging, data synchronization, audio transmission, and CarPlay in-car connectivity. 新款连接线提供闪电黑、奔涌灰、飚速蓝和劲速红四种配色、支持最高 240W 快速充电，兼容所有搭载 USB-C 接口的苹果及 Android 设备，支持充电、数据同步、音频传输、CarPlay 车载连接等多种使用场景。

In terms of durability, the cable features an anti-tangle braided exterior design and is internally reinforced to prevent wear. According to Beats official introduction, the product underwent thousands of hours of testing during its design and manufacturing process. 耐用性方面，连接线采用防缠结编织外层设计，内部经过加固处理以防磨损，据 Beats 官方介绍，产品在设计和制造过程中历经数千小时测试。

item.title: 萤石发布 AI 全品类新品
item.guid: 萤石发布-AI-全品类新品
item.description:
Yesterday, EZVIZ held its 2026 Brand New Product Launch Event, themed "Intelligent Driving, Moving Forward." At the event, EZVIZ unveiled four major categories of AI new products, collaborated with the China Academy of Information and Communications Technology (CAICT) Shanghai East China Telecommunications Research Institute to release an AI Visual IoT Security White Paper, and simultaneously launched a child safety public welfare project. Regarding new products: 昨天，萤石举办 2026 品牌新品发布会，主题为「驭智·向前」。发布会上，萤石集中发布四大品类 AI 新品、联合中国信通院上海华东电信研究院发布 AI 视觉物联网安全白皮书，同步启动儿童安全公益项目。新品方面：

    EZVIZ AI CoreX : A local smart hub, equipped with Blue Ocean Large Model 2.0 and Home Vita AI intelligent agent, featuring 24G+128G memory and 64T computing power. It supports unified management of all household devices, natural language video retrieval, and automatic generation of video summaries, and will first be launched in overseas markets;

    AI Portable Camera EZVIZ Pika : Positioned as children's "first AI device," it features front and rear dual 4K cameras, weighs only 80 grams, has built-in GPS+Beidou positioning, integrates dual 4G cards with lifelong free data, and supports high-definition two-way video calls;

    Little Magic Cube CB60 Pro Battery 4G Waterproof Version : Upgraded with radar penetration detection, GPS+Beidou positioning, and a detachable magnetic base, adapting to complex outdoor environments;

    Little Magic Cube CB30 "Jiejie Beast" : Dual 5-megapixel lenses achieve a 180° ultra-wide angle, 4G networking, suitable for flexible scenarios such as camping and temporary care;

    Magic Pellet 90f : Multi-lens design with intelligent tracking, aimed at users with panoramic monitoring needs;

    Smart Doorbell CP8 4G Waterproof Version : Supports lifelong free 4G data, IP65 waterproof, 5MP image quality, and features AI human shape detection;

    AI Face Video Lock Y31 Ultra : Features a 4.4-inch OLED outdoor large screen, panoramic lens supporting 360° monitoring and VR preview, dual AI face and fingerprint unlocking, equipped with an interactive 3D AI intelligent agent and "Shan Hai Rui Shou" (Mythical Beasts) nurturing gameplay;

    Stella Star 10 Master : The world's first AI dual-engine steam floor washing robot, featuring 36000Pa dual-fan wet and dry separation, 190℃ steam and 95℃ hot active water cleaning, lifelong no water change, and equipped with the Star World Model for intelligent path planning and cleaning intensity adjustment.

item.title: Xiaomi Vision GT 将亮相 2026 北京国际车展
item.guid: Xiaomi-Vision-GT-将亮相-2026-北京国际车展
item.description:
Yesterday, Xiaomi announced that its concept car, Xiaomi Vision Gran Turismo, is set to debut at the 2026 Beijing International Auto Show, marking the model's first appearance at a domestic auto show. 昨天，小米宣布，其概念车 Xiaomi Vision Gran Turismo 即将亮相 2026 北京国际车展，同时也是该车型首次在国内车展与大家见面。

It is reported that the Xiaomi Vision Gran Turismo concept car made its global debut at the MWC 2026 Xiaomi Global Launch Event in Barcelona, Spain, on February 28, 2026. It is the first Vision Gran Turismo designed by a Chinese brand and Xiaomi's answer to the "future of supercars." 据悉，Xiaomi Vision Gran Turismo 概念车已于 2026 年 2 月 28 日在西班牙巴塞罗那的 MWC 2026 小米全球发布会上首发亮相。它是首个由中国品牌设计的 Vision Gran Turismo，也是小米对「超级跑车未来」的一次回答。

item.title: 小米 miclaw 上线 PC、Mac 和有屏音箱版
item.guid: 小米-miclaw-上线-PC、Mac-和有屏音箱版
item.description:
Xiaomi announced yesterday that miclaw has officially begun a small-scale closed beta across multiple terminals, adding PC, Mac, and smart display speaker versions. Users can apply for testing qualifications on the Xiaomi Community. 小米昨天宣布，miclaw 正式开启多终端小范围封测，新增 PC 版、Mac 版与有屏音箱版，用户可前往小米社区申请测试资格。

Lu Weibing, President of Xiaomi Group, stated on Weibo that he has recently been "raising shrimp" (a metaphor for developing miclaw), and miclaw can now work across multiple terminals. With a single command, it can link phones, PCs, and Mijia devices, showing improved experience, and the Mac version is convenient for Apple users to try out. 小米集团总裁卢伟冰在微博表示，自己最近一直在「养虾」，miclaw 可以跨多端干活了，一句话实现手机、PC和米家联动，体验有进步，Mac 版也方便苹果用户尝鲜。

The PC and Mac versions come with 18 built-in Skills and 19 third-party MCP services, offering one-click installation. They support desktop scenarios such as document organization, data analysis, and batch file processing. The minimum system requirements are Windows 10 64-bit or macOS 12 Monterey. PC 版与 Mac 版内置 18 个 Skill 与 19 个第三方 MCP 服务，一键安装，支持文档整理、数据分析、批量文件处理等桌面场景，最低系统要求为 Windows 10 64 位或 macOS 12 Monterey。

The screen speaker version is designed for home scenarios, running on Xiaomi Smart Home Screen 11, supporting voice wake-up and multi-round conversations, capable of triggering multi-device linkage, and calling on mobile phones and PCs to perform deep operations, allowing independent interaction without a mobile phone. 有屏音箱版面向家庭场景，基于小米智能家庭屏 11 运行，支持语音唤醒与多轮对话，可触发多设备联动，并调用手机与 PC 执行深度操作，无需手机即可独立交互。

The three ends support cross-device file transfer, note-taking, and memory sharing, allowing users to directly schedule devices across platforms using natural language to complete tasks. 三端之间支持跨设备文件互传、笔记写入与记忆共享，用户可直接以自然语言跨端调度设备完成任务。

item.title: 今晚正式亮相，Smart 剧透精灵 #2 概念车
item.guid: 今晚正式亮相，Smart-剧透精灵-#2-概念车
item.description:
Yesterday, smart officially released design sketches and partial close-up images of the Concept #2 (Concept #2) on Weibo, and announced its official debut at tonight's brand night event. The smart #6 EHD will also make its global debut on the same day, with pre-sales starting at the Beijing Auto Show on April 24. 昨天，smart 官方在微博发布精灵 #2 概念车（Concept #2）设计线稿与局部特写图，并官宣将于今晚品牌之夜活动上正式亮相。精灵 #6 EHD 也将于同日全球首秀、4 月 24 日北京车展开启预售。

Official sketches show that Concept #2 continues the "four wheels, four corners" compact proportion, with a white and platinum two-tone body and a rounded shape. According to CarNewsChina, the production version of smart #2 has already begun road testing in China, with a two-door hardtop version to be launched initially, possibly followed by a convertible version, and is planned for simultaneous release in China, Europe, and other overseas markets by the end of this year. 官方释出的线稿显示，Concept #2 延续「四轮四角」紧凑比例，车身采用白金双色配色，造型圆润。而据 CarNewsChina 报道，量产版精灵 #2 已在中国展开路试，前期推出双门硬顶版，后续或追加敞篷版，计划于今年年底在中国、欧洲及其他海外市场同步上市。

The smart #6 EHD is smart's largest model to date, with body dimensions of 4906/1922/1508 mm (length/width/height) and a wheelbase of 2926 mm. It is positioned as a mid-size hatchback coupe, primarily targeting the Chinese market; 精灵 #6 EHD 则是 smart 迄今尺寸最大的车型，车身长宽高分别为 4906/1922/1508 mm，轴距 2926 mm，定位中型掀背轿跑，主攻中国市场；

It is powered by a 1.5T plug-in hybrid system with a combined power of 320 kW, a maximum pure electric range of 285 km under CLTC conditions, and a comprehensive range of up to 1810 km. The interior features a dual-screen layout for the center console and passenger seat, and comes standard with a 20-speaker Sennheiser 7.1.4 channel audio system with a peak power exceeding 2000W. 动力搭载 1.5T 插电混动系统，综合功率 320 kW，CLTC 工况纯电续航最高 285 km，综合续航可达 1810 km。内饰采用中控与副驾双联屏布局，标配 20 扬声器森海塞尔 7.1.4 声道音响系统，峰值功率超 2000W。

item.title: 航旅纵横崩了，登机现场一度混乱
item.guid: 航旅纵横崩了，登机现场一度混乱
item.description:
Yesterday, the Civil Aviation travel service App "Flight Manager" (航旅纵横) experienced a sudden large-scale service anomaly. Many users opening the App saw "Service temporarily unavailable, please try again later," and core functions such as itinerary information, electronic boarding passes, and boarding gates could not load normally, affecting passengers at airports across multiple regions nationwide. 昨天，民航出行服务 App 航旅纵横突发大规模服务异常，大量用户打开 App 后显示「服务暂时不可用，请稍后再试」，行程信息、电子登机牌、登机口等核心功能均无法正常加载，波及范围覆盖全国多地机场旅客。

Flight Manager's official statement released in the afternoon confirmed that the outage occurred around 12:30 PM. The technical team is working hard to fix it and advised passengers to temporarily check their itineraries and complete check-in procedures through airline or airport counters, while also promising to provide updates on the repair progress as soon as possible. 航旅纵横官方于下午发布情况说明，确认故障发生于中午 12:30 左右，技术团队正全力抢修，并建议旅客暂时通过航空公司或机场柜台等渠道查询行程及办理登机手续，同时承诺将尽快同步修复进展。

Related topics quickly spread on social media. Many netizens reported: "Only at the boarding gate did I realize the App crashed, electronic boarding passes couldn't be displayed, almost missed the flight," "Refreshed for ten minutes, always network abnormal," "Didn't get a paper ticket, relied entirely on the App, but the system crashed, had to ask staff everywhere." 相关话题在社交平台上迅速发酵。多名网友反映：「到登机口才发现 App 崩了，电子登机牌出不来，差点误机」「刷了十分钟都是网络异常」「没取纸质票，全靠 App，结果系统瘫痪，只能到处问工作人员」。

Other passengers stated that because they couldn't view their seat numbers, they had to ask ground staff one by one during boarding, leading to a chaotic scene. 另有旅客表示，因无法查看座位号，只能登机时逐个询问地服人员，现场一度混乱。

item.title: Beats x JENNIE 联名回归，玛瑙黑特别版 Solo 4 本周五开售
item.guid: Beats-x-JENNIE-联名回归，玛瑙黑特别版-Solo-4-本周五开售
item.description:
Beats and JENNIE have once again teamed up to launch the Onyx Black special edition Beats Solo 4 over-ear headphones, along with JENNIE's exclusive unreleased track. The new product will officially go on sale this Friday at 9 AM, priced at 1799 yuan. Beats 与 JENNIE 再度联手，推出玛瑙黑特别版 Beats Solo 4 头戴式耳机，并同步带来 JENNIE 的独家未发行曲目。新品将于本周五上午 9 点正式开售，售价 1799 元。

This marks the second collaboration between the two parties. In 2025, the JENNIE special edition Ruby Red Beats Solo 4 sold out almost instantly after its launch in several major markets; even earlier, JENNIE first starred in the Beats Solo Buds promotional video in 2024, thus beginning her partnership with Beats. 这是双方的第二次联名合作。2025 年，JENNIE 特别版宝石红 Beats Solo 4 在多个主要市场开售后几乎瞬间售罄；更早之前，JENNIE 于 2024 年首次领衔出演 Beats Solo Buds 宣传影片，由此开启与 Beats 的合作关系。

This new Onyx Black model continues the minimalist monochromatic design language, featuring two detachable black bows, with symbols inspired by JENNIE's music engraved on one side of the UltraPlush cushioned earcups, and comes with a matching portable case. The accompanying promotional short film centers on iconic ribbon elements to present a complete visual narrative. 此次玛瑙黑新款延续了简约单色的设计语言，配有两枚可拆卸黑色蝴蝶结，单侧 UltraPlush 软垫耳罩上刻印了灵感源自 JENNIE 音乐作品的符号，并随附同色系便携盒。配套宣传短片以标志性的丝带元素为核心，呈现完整的视觉叙事。

item.title: 微信支付扫码覆盖韩国、泰国等五国
item.guid: 微信支付扫码覆盖韩国、泰国等五国
item.description:
Yesterday, WeChat Pay announced its integration with local payment QR code networks in several overseas countries, covering South Korea, Sri Lanka, Thailand, Malaysia, and Singapore. Users can now complete payments by directly scanning local merchant QR codes with WeChat, without needing to switch apps. 昨天，微信支付宣布接入多个海外国家的本地支付二维码网络，覆盖韩国、斯里兰卡、泰国、马来西亚及新加坡，用户无需切换 App，直接使用微信扫描当地收款码即可完成支付。

Specifically, the five countries correspond to different local payment systems: South Korea uses ZeroPay, Sri Lanka uses LANKAQR, Thailand uses PromptPay, Malaysia uses DuitNow QR, and Singapore uses SGQR+ (with NETS and WeChat Pay logos). 具体来看，五个国家分别对应不同的本地支付体系：韩国为 ZeroPay、斯里兰卡为 LANKAQR、泰国为 PromptPay、马来西亚为 DuitNow QR、新加坡为 SGQR+（带有 NETS 及微信支付 logo）。

The QR codes vary in appearance across different regions, ranging from pink, yellow, blue, orange to red, but all are integrated with WeChat Pay, enabling unified scanning. 各地二维码外观各异，从粉、黄、蓝、橙到红色均有，但均已与微信支付打通，实现统一扫码。

item.title: 官方回应珠海音乐节「入场测酒精，场内却卖酒」
item.guid: 官方回应珠海音乐节「入场测酒精，场内却卖酒」
item.description:
According to China Newsweek, an electronic music festival in Zhuhai, Guangdong, recently attracted widespread attention due to conflicting regulations: "alcohol testing upon entry, but alcohol sold inside." 据《中国新闻周刊》报道，广东珠海一场电音节近日因「入场测酒精、场内卖酒」的矛盾规定引发广泛关注。

Videos posted by multiple netizens showed several individuals in auxiliary police uniforms holding alcohol testers, checking each attendee upon entry. Those with excessive alcohol levels were denied entry. However, once inside, beer was openly sold. 多名网友发布视频显示，多名身着辅警制服的人员手持酒精测试仪，对入场观众逐一进行检测，酒精含量超标者将被拒绝入场。然而入场后，场内却有啤酒公开售卖。

Yesterday, staff from the Hengqin Guangdong-Macao Deep Cooperation Zone's Bureau of Livelihood Affairs, the guiding unit for the VAC Electronic Music Festival, responded that last year, the festival experienced safety and medical incidents due to excessive alcohol consumption by attendees. To prevent a recurrence this year, the organizers added an alcohol testing procedure at the entry point and simultaneously strengthened security. 昨日，VAC 电音节指导单位横琴粤澳深度合作区民生事务局工作人员回应称，去年该电音节曾出现观众因饮酒过量引发安全及医疗事故，为避免今年重蹈覆辙，主办方在入场环节新增了酒精检测程序，并同步加强了安保力量。

Regarding the contradiction of "no alcohol allowed inside, yet alcohol is sold," the staff member explained that the original rules prohibited attendees from bringing alcohol in and also prohibited selling alcohol inside. "However, for an event like an electronic music festival, if alcohol isn't sold, attendees might feel they can't get hyped without it." 针对「场内禁酒却又卖酒」的矛盾，该工作人员解释称，现场原本规定不允许观众携酒入场，也不允许场内售酒，「但在电音节这种形式活动下，不让卖酒，观众又会觉得没有酒精就嗨不起来」。

After multi-party negotiations, it was finally decided to allow the event's title sponsor to sell alcoholic beverages on-site, but at the same time, each audience member was limited to purchasing 2 cups of beer to control alcohol intake. 经多方协商后，最终决定允许活动冠名商在场内售卖酒精饮品，但同时规定每位观众限购 2 杯啤酒，以控制酒精摄入量。

For audience members who have consumed alcohol before entering or whose alcohol content is found to be excessive, staff will guide them to a designated resting area by the side of the venue to wait. They will be allowed to enter with their original ticket once sober, and can enter normally until the end of the event. 对于入场前已饮酒、被检测出体内酒精含量超标的观众，工作人员表示将引导其至场边休息区等待，待酒醒后方可凭原票入场，活动结束前均可正常进场。

item.title: 陈思诚《10 间敢死队》北影节场刊夺冠，定档五一
item.guid: 陈思诚《10-间敢死队》北影节场刊夺冠，定档五一
item.description:
According to Xinhua News Agency, the film 'The Expendables 10' recently held multiple screenings at the Beijing International Film Festival and is currently ranked first in the festival's magazine ratings. 据新华网报道，电影《10 间敢死队》近日在北京国际电影节举行了多场放映活动，并在场刊评分暂列第一。

The film deconstructs life's issues with laughter, 'making you feel as if you are in Ward 10, laughing and crying with that group of people, experiencing the impermanence of life together, and being moved by human kindness.' 影片以欢笑解构生命议题，「让你仿佛置身在 10 号病房，与那群人一同欢笑，一同大哭，一同感受生命无常，被人与人的善意感动。」

item.title: 《真人快打 2》发布全新预告，5 月 8 日上映
item.guid: 《真人快打-2》发布全新预告，5-月-8-日上映
item.description:
The R-rated action film 'Mortal Kombat 2', adapted from the fighting game, released its latest trailer yesterday and will officially premiere on May 8th this year. 格斗游戏改编 R 级动作片《真人快打 2》昨日发布最新预告片，今年 5 月 8 日正式上映。

The film revolves around Johnny Cage, a washed-up Hollywood actor, who is unexpectedly chosen and drawn into a life-or-death combat that will decide the fate of Earth. Regarding the new cast members, Karl Urban plays Johnny Cage, Adeline Rudolph portrays Kitana, and Martyn Ford will play Shao Kahn. 本片围绕一位过气好莱坞演员强尼·凯奇展开——他被意外选中，卷入一场决定地球命运的生死格斗。新加盟演员阵容方面，卡尔·厄本出演强尼·凯奇，阿德莱恩·鲁道夫饰演吉塔娜，马丁·福特则将出演绍康一角。

Meanwhile, main actors such as Ludi Lin (Liu Kang), Mehcad Brooks (Jax), Jessica McNamee (Sonya Blade), and Hiroyuki Sanada (Scorpion) all return for the sequel. Simon McQuoid, director of the first film, continues to direct this installment. 与此同时，林路迪（刘康）、麦卡德·布鲁克斯（Jax）、杰西卡·麦克娜美（刀锋索尼娅）、真田广之（蝎子）等主要演员均回归续集。首部导演西蒙·麦奎德继续执导本片。
